How many goals can you score?

name: BALL SORT SOCCER
description:
Game Controls (aka) How To play:  Game is played with mouse.
Quick Summary of the Game: Dive into the vibrant world of Ball Sort Soccer, a captivating puzzle experience where your strategic prowess takes center stage. As you kick off, strategically arrange soccer balls of matching hues into designated tubes, adding an electrifying twist to the World Cup fervor. Show off your color-coordination finesse and unravel the thrill of this soccer-inspired challenge. Get ready to maneuver, strategize, and revel in the excitement as you align the spheres for an unparalleled gaming adventure. name: BOOBLEHEAD SOCCER
description:
Game Controls (aka) How To play:  Move: use the arrow keys.
Shot the ball: space key
Power kick: use the X key.
Quick Summary of the Game: Step into the whimsical world of BoobleHead Soccer, where pint-sized bobblehead soccer stars engage in a lively battle on the field. Maneuver your mini gladiators strategically, aiming to send goals soaring into your opponent’s net. Unleash the chaos with power-ups that could turn the tide in your favor. Face off against 20+ top-tier soccer players, each more formidable than the last. As you progress through the levels, the competition intensifies, reaching a fever pitch by Level 3. Forget the conventional FIFA World Cup; this game is a puppet soccer extravaganza that fans will adore!

name: FOOTBALL RUN
description:
Game Controls (aka) How To play:  WASD and ARROW keys for playing.
Quick Summary of the Game: Experience the exhilarating rush of Football Run, a dynamic game that challenges you to sprint towards the finish line while skillfully navigating through parkour-inspired obstacles. As you race with the ball, showcase your agility and precision, collecting coins along the way to boost your score. Immerse yourself in the heart-pounding excitement of this unique blend of football and parkour, where every step counts. Will you conquer the challenging terrain and emerge victorious? Lace up your virtual boots, embrace the adrenaline, and embark on an electrifying journey through the immersive world of Football Run.

name: FOOTBALL STRIKE
description:
Game Controls (aka) How To play:  Game is played with mouse.
Quick Summary of the Game: Indulge your soccer passion with Football Strike! Compete against pals in the thrilling PVP penalty shootout mode or carve your soccer legacy in Tournament mode. Roam diverse global stadiums, tackling unique challenges for coveted medals. Personalize your striker and goalie with an array of unlockable items, flaunting your unique style or showcasing your team’s hues. Which soccer squad holds your heart? Dive into the exhilarating world of Football Strike, where every goal, every save, defines your soccer journey. Ready to experience the beautiful game like never before?

Whether facing off against the computer in the intense 1P mode or challenging friends in the dynamic 2P mode, the game offers a plethora of exciting options. Can you outscore your opponents and dominate the field? It’s time to unleash your soccer prowess and experience the thrill of Head Soccer 2023!

name: PENALTY SHOOTERS 3
description:
Game Controls (aka) How To play:  Observe the shot power indicator.
Press the left mouse button (or press the screen) to start the shot.
Keep it pressed while the shot target is moving.
Release the button at the right moment to kick the ball.
Quick Summary of the Game: Step onto the virtual pitch in Penalty Shooters 3, a thrilling soccer game that puts you in the cleats of both the striker and the goalie. Choose between two exciting modes - Tier Mode with six challenging tiers, and the World Cup, where prestigious arenas await your conquest. Show off your style by customizing your players’ jerseys for that extra flair. Perfect your timing with a simple click, as you face off against an AI that evolves and grows more formidable with each match. With 250+ whimsical teams, power-ups, and achievements, the excitement is boundless. Gear up for victory!

name: SMALL WORLD CUP
description:
Game Controls (aka) How To play:  Game is played with mouse.
Quick Summary of the Game: A Small World Cup game online is the perfect game for any soccer fan looking for a fun and easy way to play their favorite sport. The graphics are bright and colorful, and the gameplay is fast-paced and exciting. Whether you’re playing against the computer or competing against other players online, A Small World Cup game online is a great way to experience the excitement of soccer from the comfort of your own home.

name: SOCCER HEADS
description:
Game Controls (aka) How To play:  SINGLEPLAYER:
Arrow keys to move
M to kick
TWOPLAYER:
To move, player 1 use the WASD keys and player 2 use arrow keys
To kick, player 1 use G and player 2 use M
Quick Summary of the Game: Dive into the exhilarating world of Soccer Heads, a lively two-player soccer extravaganza showcasing renowned UK football teams. Challenge the computer solo or engage in a fierce duel with a friend. Unleash the chaos as you strive for goals in a frantic showdown against the clock. Picture it as the digital foosball arena, where you strategically kick and head the ball to outscore your opponent. With an arsenal of extras and power-ups, Soccer Heads promises a riotous 60-second battle to determine the ultimate victor. Experience the thrill, strategize, and emerge victorious in this silly soccer showdown!

name: SUPER LIQUID SOCCER
description:
Game Controls (aka) How To play:  Movement: WASD
Pass: M
Shoot: J
Chip: L
Through pass: I
Switch player: Q or E
Sprint: P or O
Quick Summary of the Game: Dive into the dynamic world of Super Liquid Soccer, Punyrobot’s whimsical creation that transforms the beautiful game into a playful, floppy spectacle! Pick your cherished country and explore an array of techniques, from delicate chip passes to precise through balls. With a myriad of playing styles, the path to World Champion is uniquely yours to chart. Engage in thrilling penalty shootouts, showcasing your skills both on offense and defense. Lace up your boots, feel the adrenaline, and embrace the challenge – can you conquer the soccer realm and claim the coveted title?
